en_body:
Hoàng-Ân............................................

MEANING SNARED, WORDS ENTRAPPED...........
............................................................


We are those who forever measure
Words and meanings, thoughts and phrases...

Sometimes...I think to myself:
The ancients also tried to slip free
from those meshes of the net!

And then...
How many scriptures, canons,
ancient tales,
were
born!

The difficulty rests here,
I have learned it through myself:
when I
want
You to understand clearly enough
to love me truly
whole...

when...
I tell You:
"I love You!"
and wait
for You to say
also to me:
"I love you..!!"
note: The title plays on the Buddhist-Zen problem of meaning becoming caught in language, while the poem turns that philosophical snare into a lover's need to hear love spoken.
